---
title: "Shreya Anekar"
image: "files/DSC00084.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:shreyaanekar27@address.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sanekar27
---

```{=html}
<style>
.about-bio {
  max-width: 680px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  text-align: left;
}


.nav-cards {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-top: 2.5rem;
  max-width: 720px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}

.nav-card {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 1.4rem 1rem;
  border: 1.5px solid #e5e7eb;
  border-radius: 12px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  background: #ffffff;
  transition: all 0.22s ease;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  color: #374151 !important;
}

.nav-card:hover {
  border-color: #1a6cf5;
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(26,108,245,0.12);
  color: #1a6cf5 !important;
}

.nav-card .nav-icon {
  font-size: 1.6rem;
}

.nav-card .nav-label {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.nav-card .nav-desc {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #9ca3af;
  text-align: center;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

.section-divider {
  border: none;
  border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  margin: 2rem auto;
  max-width: 680px;
}
</style>

<div class="about-bio">


<p>
I'm a data engineer and analytics professional with 4+ years of experience building production-grade data pipelines, ML models, and analytics platforms across fintech, banking, and enterprise software. I currently work toward my <strong>M.S. in Business Analytics at UC San Diego</strong>, where I focus on predictive modeling, customer analytics, and big data engineering.
</p>

<p>
My career spans two high-impact roles — at <strong>Addepar</strong>, engineering financial data infrastructure for clients managing $500M+ AUM, and at <strong>Fiserv</strong>, delivering zero-data-loss migrations of $2B+ in banking assets. I love the intersection of rigorous engineering and analytical storytelling: turning messy, fragmented data into systems and insights that drive real decisions.
</p>

<p>
Beyond data, I'm a <strong>competitive chess player</strong> who represented India at the World Chess Championship during my undergraduate years — an experience that sharpened my instinct for strategic thinking, pattern recognition, and staying calm under pressure. Those same skills follow me into every complex data problem I take on.
</p>

<p>
I'm passionate about forecasting, customer intelligence, and building tools that make data accessible and actionable. If I'm not buried in a Databricks notebook, I'm probably playing chess or exploring a new dataset.
</p>

</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<div class="nav-cards">
  <a href="experience.qmd" class="nav-card">
    <span class="nav-icon">💼</span>
    <span class="nav-label">Experience</span>
    <span class="nav-desc">Addepar · Fiserv and more</span>
  </a>
  <a href="projects.qmd" class="nav-card">
    <span class="nav-icon">🔬</span>
    <span class="nav-label">Projects</span>
    <span class="nav-desc">ML, forecasting & dashboards</span>
  </a>
  <a href="resume.qmd" class="nav-card">
    <span class="nav-icon">📄</span>
    <span class="nav-label">Resume</span>
    <span class="nav-desc">Download or view inline</span>
  </a>
</div>
```
